fact_nuggets.text: Hospitality (Japanese: Hospitality) is an Ability introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is the signature Ability of Poltchageist and Sinistcha.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%. This Ability has no effect in Tera Raid Battles . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Hospitality has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%. This Ability has no effect in Tera Raid Battles .
